name: To Be A Brave One
overview: A woman wakes up from a coma only to find out that she has lost everything after being betrayed by the man that she loves. After mustering the courage to overcome grief, she betters herself to start over again as she strives hard for the future of the internet industry.

trailers.title: 预告：做勇敢的自己，《致勇敢的你》圆满杀青 | 【致勇敢的你 To Be A Brave One】 | 邓家佳/官鸿/刘恩佑/陈艳茜/何泽远/刘恩佳/陈诺/高志恒 | 都市爱情片 | 优酷 YOUKU
